changes.value:
Add `color` and `avatar` fields to the actor entity so actors can have visual identity.

## Changes
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/actor.yaml` â€” add `color`, `avatar` to fields list
- New `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/definitions/avatar.yaml` â€” field def: `type: { kind: text }`, `editor: none`, `display: avatar`, `section: hidden`
- `color` reuses existing `color.yaml` field definition (shared with tags)

## Subtasks
- [ ] Add `color` and `avatar` to actor entity field list
- [ ] Create `avatar.yaml` field definition (text type, hidden section, no editor)
- [ ] Verify existing actors without these fields still load correctly
- [ ] Run `cargo test`
Add color and avatar fields to actor entity definition

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,12 +1,16 @@
-Add `color` and `avatar` fields to the actor entity so actors can have visual identity.
+Add `color`, `avatar`, `mention_prefix`, and `mention_display_field` to the actor entity so actors can have visual identity and mention support.

 ## Changes
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/actor.yaml` â€” add `color`, `avatar` to fields list
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/actor.yaml` â€” add `color`, `avatar` to fields list; add `mention_prefix: "@"`, `mention_display_field: name`
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/tag.yaml` â€” add `mention_prefix: "#"`, `mention_display_field: tag_name`
 - New `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/definitions/avatar.yaml` â€” field def: `type: { kind: text }`, `editor: none`, `display: avatar`, `section: hidden`
 - `color` reuses existing `color.yaml` field definition (shared with tags)
+- Update entity type parsing in `swissarmyhammer-fields` to read `mention_prefix` and `mention_display_field` from entity YAML

 ## Subtasks
 - [ ] Add `color` and `avatar` to actor entity field list
+- [ ] Add `mention_prefix` and `mention_display_field` to actor and tag entity definitions
+- [ ] Update entity type struct in swissarmyhammer-fields to include mention metadata
 - [ ] Create `avatar.yaml` field definition (text type, hidden section, no editor)
-- [ ] Verify existing actors without these fields still load correctly
+- [ ] Verify existing entities still load correctly
 - [ ] Run `cargo test`
\ No newline at end of file
changes.reverse_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,16 +1,12 @@
-Add `color`, `avatar`, `mention_prefix`, and `mention_display_field` to the actor entity so actors can have visual identity and mention support.
+Add `color` and `avatar` fields to the actor entity so actors can have visual identity.

 ## Changes
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/actor.yaml` â€” add `color`, `avatar` to fields list; add `mention_prefix: "@"`, `mention_display_field: name`
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/tag.yaml` â€” add `mention_prefix: "#"`, `mention_display_field: tag_name`
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/actor.yaml` â€” add `color`, `avatar` to fields list
 - New `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/definitions/avatar.yaml` â€” field def: `type: { kind: text }`, `editor: none`, `display: avatar`, `section: hidden`
 - `color` reuses existing `color.yaml` field definition (shared with tags)
-- Update entity type parsing in `swissarmyhammer-fields` to read `mention_prefix` and `mention_display_field` from entity YAML

 ## Subtasks
 - [ ] Add `color` and `avatar` to actor entity field list
-- [ ] Add `mention_prefix` and `mention_display_field` to actor and tag entity definitions
-- [ ] Update entity type struct in swissarmyhammer-fields to include mention metadata
 - [ ] Create `avatar.yaml` field definition (text type, hidden section, no editor)
-- [ ] Verify existing entities still load correctly
+- [ ] Verify existing actors without these fields still load correctly
 - [ ] Run `cargo test`
\ No newline at end of file
